name: Omu
summary: A ruined forbidden city swallowed by jungle, haunted by old gods, traps, undead and the consequences of ancient pride.
politics: No lawful ruler controls Omu; power belongs to whatever can survive its ruins.
Competing factions might seek relics, secrets or sacred sites.
culture: The ruins speak through carvings, shrines and broken civic spaces.
Every plaza feels like a warning.
